title: Automations Triggered By updates

posts.author: Peter-Halloush (Peter)
posts.cookedHtml:
We find the updates in our field pretty impractical. we have so many rows in aboard and once we read an update we struggle to find it.

our work gets updated daily and it can take us months to solve a single issue flagged in updates. registering updates manually consumes a lot of time and we need an automation for that:

This can be easily fixed for us if we can automate the following:

when an Update is created
|
|
V
Create an item on board
And Copy update link and place it in Column

this way we can create a register of updated across our complex board and we can easily translate updates into tasks and to do lists that we stay on top of every day.
